name: Madison Washable Rug - Threshold™
description:
Give your home decor a touch of simple and sophisticated style with this Rockbridge Washable Rug from Threshold™. This solid-color area rug features a complementary-colored solid border for easy, contrasting style that blends effortlessly with any existing decor. It's made from tufted fabric that feels soft under your feet, and it has skid-resistant latex backing that helps keep it in place. Best of all, since this rug is machine-washable — you can just pop it into the washing machine whenever it needs a quick refresh.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
